accurate.why: All claims are supported by the bill text or accurate context (e.g., 50 U.S.C. 1546a expedited procedures verified).

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated or contradictory claims; statutory references are accurate.

states_purpose.why: The summary clearly states the bill directs removal of U.S. Armed Forces from unauthorized hostilities with Iran.

changes_to_existing_law.why: The resolution directs presidential action and invokes existing procedures rather than amending or repealing statutes.

exceptions_conditions.why: The summary accurately covers the rule-of-construction carve-outs for self-defense, intelligence sharing, and defensive assistance.

effective_dates.why: The summary correctly cites the February 28, 2026 date relevant to the carve-outs; the bill specifies no other timing.

major_provisions_covered.why: The summary captures the removal directive, findings, expedited procedures, and limitations.

objective_tone.why: The summary is neutral and descriptive with no editorializing.

coherent.why: The summary is well-organized and internally consistent.

concise.why: The summary is appropriately concise without padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: All named statutes (War Powers Resolution, 50 U.S.C. 1546a, ISAAECA section 601(b)) are correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: The only figure, the February 28, 2026 date, matches the bill text.
